case_title: OPORTUN INC VS. BERTA C URISTA

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT URISTA, BERTA C ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00 - SERVED AUG-08-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT URISTA, BERTA C
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT URISTA, BERTA C

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-30-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT URISTA, BERTA C $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,295.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2016 - JUDGMENT.
